languages.text: "Да. Гнотек Шварц. Будущий сержант отряда 2-й палубы пустотников из рода Шварцев. Гордость нашей семьи. Я помню, вы ведь были там... и допустили его смерть". {n}Выражение лица женщины странно меняется.{/n}

"Yes. Gnotec. He would have made sergeant of Deck 2 Voidsman Unit someday. The pride of the Schwartz family. You were there too, as I recall... and you let him die." {n}The expression on the woman's face shifts strangely.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Да. Гнотек Шварц. Будущий сержант отряда 2-й палубы пустотников из рода Шварцев. Гордость нашей семьи. Я помню, вы ведь были там... и допустили его смерть". {n}Выражение лица женщины странно меняется.{/n}

languages.text: 「ええ、グノテック。シュワルツ家の23番隊、2番空挺連隊の将来の准尉。我々の家の誇り。だからお前もそこにいたのか…そしてお前は彼を死なせたのか」{n}その女性の顔は奇妙に変化する。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes. Gnotec. The Schwartz family's future sergeant of 23rd Company, 2nd Void Trooper Regiment. The pride of our clan. So you were there, too... and you let him die." {n}The expression on the woman's face shifts strangely.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「ええ、グノテック。シュワルツ家の23番隊、2番空挺連隊の将来の准尉。我々の家の誇り。だからお前もそこにいたのか…そしてお前は彼を死なせたのか。」{n}その女性の顔は奇妙に変化する。{/n}

languages.text: "Evet. Gnotec. Bir gün 2. Güverte Uçsuz Neferi Birimi'nin çavuşu olacaktı. Schwartz ailesinin gururu. Hatırladığım kadarıyla siz de oradaydınız ve... Ölmesine izin verdiniz." {n}Kadının yüzündeki ifade, garip bir şekilde değişiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes. Gnotec. He would have made sergeant of Deck 2 Voidsman Unit someday. The pride of the Schwartz family. You were there too, as I recall... and you let him die." {n}The expression on the woman's face shifts strangely.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Evet. Gnotec. Bir gün 2. Güverte Uçsuz Neferi Birimi'nin çavuşu olacaktı. Schwartz ailesinin gururu. Hatırladığım kadarıyla siz de oradaydınız ve... Ölmesine izin verdiniz." {n}Kadının yüzündeki ifade, garip bir şekilde değişiyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Sí. Gnotec. El que algún día habría sido sargento de la unidad de soldados del vacío de la cubierta 2. El orgullo de la familia Schwartz. Usted también estuvo ahí, lo recuerdo... y le dejó morir». {n}La expresión de la mujer cambia de forma extraña.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes. Gnotec. He would have made sergeant of Deck 2 Voidsman Unit someday. The pride of the Schwartz family. You were there too, as I recall... and you let him die." {n}The expression on the woman's face shifts strangely.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Sí. Gnotec. El que algún día habría sido sargento de la unidad de soldados del vacío de la cubierta 2. El orgullo de la familia Schwartz. Usted también estuvo ahí, lo recuerdo... y le dejó morir». {n}La expresión de la mujer cambia de forma extraña.{/n}

languages.text: “是，诺泰克本该成为二层甲板士兵小队的军士。他是施瓦茨家的骄傲。我记得，您当时也在场……却眼睁睁看着他死去。”{n}女人脸上的神情忽然有些古怪。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes. Gnotec. He would have made sergeant of Deck 2 Voidsman Unit someday. The pride of the Schwartz family. You were there too, as I recall... and you let him die." {n}The expression on the woman's face shifts strangely.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “是，诺泰克本该成为二层甲板士兵小队的军士。他是施瓦茨家的骄傲。我记得，您当时也在场……却眼睁睁看着他死去。”{n}女人脸上的神情忽然有些古怪。{/n}

languages.text: « Oui. Gnotec. Il devait devenir sergent de l'unité des cosmomarins du pont 2. Il faisait la fierté de la famille Schwartz. Et je crois me souvenir que vous étiez là, vous aussi... et vous l'avez laissé mourir », {n}conclut la femme en affichant une expression étrange.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes. Gnotec. He would have made sergeant of Deck 2 Voidsman Unit someday. The pride of the Schwartz family. You were there too, as I recall... and you let him die." {n}The expression on the woman's face shifts strangely.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Oui. Gnotec. Il devait devenir sergent de l'unité des cosmomarins du pont 2. Il faisait la fierté de la famille Schwartz. Et je crois me souvenir que vous étiez là, vous aussi... et vous l'avez laissé mourir », {n}conclut la femme en affichant une expression étrange.{/n}

languages.text: "Ja. Gnotec. Er wäre eines Tages Sergeant der Raumfahrereinheit von Deck 2 geworden. Der ganze Stolz der Schwartz-Familie. Ihr wart auch dort, soweit ich mich erinnere ... und habt ihn sterben lassen." {n}Der Ausdruck im Gesicht der Frau verändert sich merkwürdig.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes. Gnotec. He would have made sergeant of Deck 2 Voidsman Unit someday. The pride of the Schwartz family. You were there too, as I recall... and you let him die." {n}The expression on the woman's face shifts strangely.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ja. Gnotec. Er wäre eines Tages Sergeant der Raumfahrereinheit von Deck 2 geworden. Der ganze Stolz der Schwartz-Familie. Ihr wart auch dort, soweit ich mich erinnere ... und habt ihn sterben lassen." {/n}Der Ausdruck im Gesicht der Frau verändert sich merkwürdig.{n}
